h0e08f4b9g9e0cg49e6g902eg862b45eb2630: Let me go. I'll sneak off and become a hermit - won't cause trouble for nobody.
hcb002dc9gac79g43e4gb61fg2640b045b21b: 'Ello again. Commander's waitin' to meet ya. Don't be shy.
h577d23d1gdaf9g45a5g8d36gd7714329069a: Take this. It's everything I've got. I won't try t'get ya killed again, promise.
h345c7316gd5adg4484g869dgd5c0a92d19b6: Slow down. I have questions for you.
hb3f3b8abg6919g49dfg9834ge00dfccb3ac6: I tell ya anything, and my life ain't worth a rat's breakfast.
hdbd858fegcdf6g4732g8195ge56061e889ad: Bad news for me. Good news for the spiders.
h376e7bacgda3fg4f99g8960g8dc2cf8db3d9: She's got all kind of booyahg. Sickly-tastin' stuff - might make your limbs grow back, but it's sour as a bugbear's widdle.
hcc97e082g13d7g48e0g803cg0145c6e4e296: A tribe like yours must have plenty of treasure. Where's it hiding?
h0f1a3db3gfab9g412dga199gaa0542a60d2c: I saw Dror Ragzlin stash some stuff behind the waterfall near the bridge.
h74d7e38agc57dg4bd6gb89cg3f1c66e0b187: You want it? It's yours! It's all yours!
haa41f6e9gaa25g4294ga9c3gb7ac11b74764: Is that it? Can I go?
h85efc859ge51fg4935g97f4gb759a58228c2: An' that's all I know, I swear.
h42250ad6g599dg4501g96d5ga4c1482ca162: I tell ya anyfing, they'll toss me back in the pit!
habba0a94g7a57g426cg8e7dg5dae82f2deb2: I've saved your hide twice now. You owe me.
ha999f2e3gdcd2g4d02g9c5eg66ff10904bae: Dunno - never repaid anything. But you been square with me, true.
hb6ebbea3g34f4g4ff6g8294gea6972c2f925: Dunno. I don't repay 'em, as a rule.
h2000bdf5g0f0bg48ccgb0b8g429c12a45fb3: I ain't sayin' nuffin' else. They'll kill me an' kill me slow.
hde3cc517g8d6bg4359g80ffg3671efc5b2ba: O' course, I'll prob'ly be a rat's breakfast myself if I don't tell this one something.
h9d608a4ega9e9g4daagb557g1fd5c52982e8: You're in trouble no matter what. You may as well talk.
he4cca997g2ad5g464eg895fgd72221d70b6c: I guess yer right - I'm worgmeat either way.
h2582ddebg2e18g4e26g90cbg2aa9cec60762: What are ya... what are ya doin'?
h1d42921egc830g4459gbe08gd27d7b339e2d: I won't bother ya any more. I swear.
h6b583865g2272g43ceg8e06g042e4de87c42: Gonna go tell the commander 'bout you. All nice things, 'course.
h140ba160gd051g402dg8e47gb14de3565796: Ah, thought I was never gonna get outta there.
h0ac6e449gc522g4b53gb09dgd9f25185c19a: Good to be free again, gotta say.
hc385290eg8df8g472egbdd1ga9fe17a0d4ad: Gratitude doesn't help me. Tell me about that priestess.
hdfa39236g93cfg4ea8gae77ge3e4a364e75f: You made me a promise, remember?
hfed0efebg6863g43acgaff6gacf92416bbc2: Never break a promise unless there's somefin' in it for me.
h9a843691g534eg42fag8967gd3d837ea1b67: I'll introduce ya to my whole tribe, and put in a good word for ya - see ya at the camp.
hd1ccee79g62abg4e4dg86e4g54f05490ff27: No one deserves to be locked up like that.
hadb52f5ag0017g46f4gb591g229e71e8db84: I'll do a lot worse than that cage if you don't make this worth my while.
hcc5ae5f4g2e72g4cd0g8a10gcfe2963ea511: I met your friend. Ready to go?
ha5c979e6gd789g4da7g8509g96e6f3748974: Didn't expect to see a drow in here. Did the boss lady send you to rescue me?
h42dd8318gc8b9g4140g880eg00c3440b0b45: Another drow - she's one of my best mates. Thought you might work for her.
hce610343g7cb6g4115ga694g380915e42756: Get me outta here, and I'll take you to meet her and the rest of my tribe.
h2874f112g27c2g434bg938bgc21307c89adf: If she's as cruel as you say, she'll crush your tribe under her heel.
h59bf77e4g7e26g4b6cgbb20g4dcc16a941fd: Things are changin'. The Absolute's bringin' us all together - goblins, drow, duergar, gnolls.
h28ef8e84g9cd0g40acgaf81g7228a50c3813: Take me home, and Priestess Gut will brand you so you can join the tribe as well.
h87eac866g2156g486dg9539gb2ae34c831a2: I've made some strange alliances, but... is she really your 'mate'?
h15fccc34g8d50g44e4g868eg8b72c6e369dd: No drow would sully themselves in a goblin tribe. That's madness.
hd8569f47g177dg4aa2gb57bg238ac662d7f7: You're not mates with the teefs are you? You need to get back to your own people before you go soft.
h6065b5bdg605ag4c49ga673gf816068a28a1: The lady that sent me here's the cruellest drow I ever met. You could learn a thing or two from her.
h9358d20cgdadcg481agbc06g3ab1164b8122: Yes, she sent me. Ready to get out of here?
h8759427fgab32g4a95gb929g59180947fdce: Yeah. Take me back to the tribe, and we'll tell the boss all about this pretty little place so she can burn it to the ground.
h95670324gf9d3g44a5g9c08g3839106907f2: We'll be heroes, blessed by priestess Gut in the name of the Absolute.
h6e4ece31g0ce4g4d2dg86a2g0b80c680ea11: Don't believe you. You ain't got enough scars to be one of her playthings.
hb50eedbegda50g423ag8007ge883fcb0390c: Don't believe you. There's something a bit soft about you.
h6522b4fbg9f43g4d1cga082gdfde938292b9: Yer a long way from home, ain't ya, underdwarf?
h895ef1e3g600bg4bf6gba55g2fe90a5db8bf: Get me outta 'ere, an' I'll introduce you to my tribe. You'd like 'em.
h5c07a5a4g2d67g42a4g8bedgfb8c3968ae35: All right. You've captured my interest.
h79728801g5648g46b5g93ccg1c1599cb1d6b: Priestess Gut will give a little under-dweller like you all the blessings of the Absolute.
hc898b32eg4c3bg42e6gbb3eg4e0cf925cbf5: Follow me. I'll keep you safe.
h941f9f2agf51eg40fega26egf37546e4eebf: What could a tribe of goblins possibly offer me?
h75e07222g121cg4900gb0ecga9d7e9e0bb84: The power of the Absolute, of course! Priestess Gut will tell you all about her and get ya branded.
h456abfbegccb9g4b06g8ebfgbb29321f77c1: You won't believe what you can do once you've got the blessin' of the Absolute.
h90a5ee98g838eg4ab1gb96bgc7f061649204: We're burnin'  her name across the face o' the world, we are.
h70fdd754gdae3g4caag9c6cg960d312a1c03: The Absolute is gold from the sky, she is. The blessin' in the storm an' the storm itself.
h086e888fgeaffg4f33g9c06gf6468b7907cc: Ain't sure why ya killed yer own to protect me. Don't care, neither.
h1827457fg8cf2g4641gad4fg528473675062: It's too late to make friends, worgmeat. My tribe's comin'.
hbdfc7a3ega86bg40d3g8bacg379dd9262c80: They're gonna burn this pretty place for the glory of the Absolute and 'ang ya by yer guts.
h3150f183g79b0g4b2cg92b3ga9287dacd4e5: I just saved your life. Show some gratitude.
h5b9e52c2g6d74g4b37g9e5egc795120ce698: Think my tribe'll care? They'll peel yer face off and nail it to a wall!
he2fdb501g6c22g4e38gace0g48f16b238610: Unless... unless ya listen to me. I can save ya.
h19260713g4bb2g4a92gb8f7g5c9a66380eec: Help me escape, an' I'll tell my mates to leave ya alone.
hbd5ff42fgcfd4g4cf8g9f72g05c568780cda: Wot do ya say? We 'ave a deal?
h1aba6a7agdc7dg4fe6gbcb8g61a14cf9d8dc: It's a deal, signed and struck.
h53a42ba6ga0deg43c8gba8dgd1b99881c517: Then hurry up an' do it. My tribe ain't as friendly as I am.
h0fcd0076gf44ag4b31gbfccgbf413b27db5e: Follow me. I'll keep you safe.
h7f852472g0aeag4800gada6g24f4bcca1518: Do I look like I'm scared of goblins? I'll smash 'em, like the last lot.
he2f5028ag9ee3g4f82gbdb2gf761bd8ffd29: They can try, but they won't be the first goblins I've killed today.
h94d57ab2g87b6g419fg881bgb14b7c8339bf: We got more than ya can 'andle. We're gonna tear yer gate down an' peel yer skins off.
h002e5e64g2dd6g4b63g8e84g26f20fd75421: Who is this god you keep mentioning?
hb4009ffcg202cg40c0ga4e4g7e08a2353ea2: You keep mentioning this god, but I've never seen them in my studies.
h14a947ccg00f9g4edfg852bg8615bb62eae8: Another god? I swear, Toril has more deities than there are stars in the sky.
h695c1548g1bf7g4ea7g80d1g3448f2afaf8f: This god of yours is new to me.
hb53fb520g8ab3g4a16g99b8g30491f54c864: Fascinating. It sounds like nonsense, but I'm intrigued nevertheless.
hc46f770fg373cg473cga45fg2eebc26ee27d: Help me escape, an' I'll tell my tribe to leave ya alone when they murder this place.
h02c83dd5g1b1cg41a4g995eg5d89eb2b9145: Then you can come to our camp an' learn all about the Absolute. Deal?
h6ce2af44ga610g42cbgbd7bg63781b3d4b14: With the way things are going, I could use a blessing.
h3dc10a82gf64eg4493gbd83g388a01134265: I ain't surprised. Tell you wot.
h9cda5144ga1f2g45bfga6b1gc4e86e5eabd6: An all-powerful goddess that couldn't get you out of a cage?
h8e979bd7g29a8g4a9dgae89gef1bff4f7abc: Well, maybe she sent ya to 'elp me. An' ya will, if ya wanna save yer skin.
hba5a14c0g1f66g4a6ag9a88g47a438949e4a: Don't worry, I'll be gone before the killing starts.
h5b72fb82ge929g48e2gb4b5g817f7c78d011: Oh, we like when people run - makes 'em taste sweeter when ya catch 'em.
h841575aag1f13g4e01g8fe4gf97eba99fbbe: Unless... unless ya listen to me. I can save ya.
h9f1fd838g350eg49begbf95gded69478e754: They're gonna burn this pretty camp for the glory of the Absolute and 'ang ya by yer guts.
h46b2bee0g3f65g44e2g9119gdbf60890a55e: Ah, the 'Absolute'. Is this the deity you're bowing to?
h0cceae74g17d8g43bagbe92g63fd057d6c05: I know plenty of deities, but the Absolute's a new god to me.
hdf7ddb5dgfb2bg4424ga33dgca21e311a700: The Absolute? I've read nothing of this god in my studies.
h9ef61645g7281g4d7ega10ag891a75da39ec: Another god? I swear Toril has more deities than there are stars in the sky.
h0fb84885gd953g40d9g9372g3a2634461a29: I've never heard of this god of yours.
hfb0c92f9gf7f4g46fcgbc60gbecc6bf3d6df: No point turnin' on yer own if yer just gonna give 'em a little tap.
hf3a687aag4c44g4005g8504gf3bb0b7a40e1: Why'd ya open my cage? Think we're gonna be friends?
hc90042a4g3373g40d3g8050g9cf659178368: Too late for that, worgmeat. My tribe's comin'.
hf6ca412fg1463g44c8g9baegc90e84145d22: Door's open, I see. 'Elp me escape, an' I'll introduce ya to my tribe, all friendly-like.
h9d947aaeg0d3fg4453g9813gedc5c520f086: Ready to go meet my tribe? Just say the word.
hf9c85ed9gdc7fg4c0dg9108g8aa1af2f0eb8: Oi! Don't leave yer pal Sazza behind! I can't follow yer fancy booyahg.
h780fe180ge2c8g43c8g87a4g4ed892589faa: Bloody tiefs everywhere. We movin' or wot?
h2821ef82g2deag4a3dga079gbfc359208a72: In a moment. Stay here and keep out of the way.
h804fa194g5db2g4170gb9cdg5150beb97dc9: It ain't safe here. Hurry back.
hc0bc1b8fg2cb1g438egb011g8c28877eb94f: Sure fing. I'll 'ang back a little.
h6926c84cg78b6g4e07gb583gf63ab5113e2b: We're moving. Keep close to me.
